film.title: The Odd Life of Timothy Green
film.overview: A childless couple bury a box in their backyard, containing all of their wishes for an infant. Soon, a child is born, though Timothy Green is not all that he appears.

dialogues.dialogue: Yes. Our son, Timothy, has leaves on his legs.  And we didn't tell you guys because we were afraid.  And kind of ashamed.  I even tried to cut his leaves off.  Surely you don't expect us to believe that...
dialogues.cause_raw: having a child with unusual physical characteristics

dialogues.dialogue: And us, but mostly you.  Hey.  - We were proud of you. - Mmm-hmm.  Turn the lights off in five, okay?  Good night!
But allow me to introduce you to who did.  My son, Franklin Crudstaff.  I can't begin to describe the feeling of pride I have.  Quite frankly, Franklin,  I didn't think you had it in you.
